name: Toyoda Gosei Co., Ltd.
summary: Toyoda Gosei Co., Ltd. manufactures and markets automobile parts, optoelectronic products, and other general industry products. It offers weatherstrips products, such as opening trim weatherstrips, door glass runs, door and outer weatherstrips, and luggage weatherstrips; functional components comprising fuel tank module components, power train parts, and chassis and drive train parts; interior and exterior parts; and safety system products, such as airbags, steering wheels, and other products. The company also provides solar LEDs and deep ultraviolet light source modules; and general industry products, such as air conditioning products, home construction components, construction and industrial machinery parts, and LED dynamo lights. It has operations in Japan, the Americas, Europe and Africa, and Asia. Toyoda Gosei Co., Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Kiyosu, Japan.
